title: AirDrop by Creeper56450
description: Minecraft plugin for Paper 1.21.11 that adds configurable airdrops with a graphical user interface (GUI), perfect for energizing your server with random loot events.
body:
- ✈️ AirdropPlugin
AirdropPlugin is a Minecraft plugin for Paper 1.21.11 that adds configurable airdrops with a graphical user interface (GUI), perfect for energizing your server with random loot events.
- 🚀 Features
- 📦 Airdrop System
Random airdrops spawn in the world
Automatic chest generation with loot
Visual effects (particles + sounds)
Coordinates sent in chat
- 🖥️ Graphical User Interface (GUI)
Fully configurable menu
Customizable buttons (name, lore, slot)
GUI with decorative borders
Clean PvP server-style design
- ⚙️ Advanced Configuration
Editable loot in config.yml
GUI can be modified without recompiling
Enable/disable broadcast messages
Easy to adapt for all types of servers
- 📍 Coordinate System
Coordinates displayed upon spawn
Clear message for all players
Option to add clickable teleport (extensible)
- 💡 Usage
Open the menu with /airdrop
Click on Spawn Airdrop
A chest appears randomly
Coordinates are sent in chat
Players can go and collect the loot
